root:warnings=0

root:instance_present=false
root:module_present=false
root:css_present=false
root:fragment_len=9

root/instance:none
root/module:none
root/css:none
root/fragment:len=9

root/fragment/0:span=0..31
root/fragment/0:expr="x"

root/fragment/1:raw="\n\n"

root/fragment/2/body:len=0
